vibe-bridge.label: Vibe Bridge
vibe-bridge.description: Two-way channel that bridges OpenClaw to the Vibe WebSocket bridge.

uiHints.label: Vibe Bridge
uiHints.help: Two-way channel that bridges OpenClaw to the Vibe WebSocket bridge.

pat.label: PAT
pat.help: Bearer PAT for the Vibe bridge (sensitive).

event_type.label: Event Type
event_type.help: Subscription channel name on the bridge (e.g. 'memo').

bridge_url.label: Bridge URL
bridge_url.help: WebSocket bridge URL. Default wss://bridge.vibe.us. Use ws://localhost:8787 for a local wrangler dev.

backend.label: Backend
backend.help: Set to 'dev' to add x-vibe-backend: dev on upgrade requests.
